节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The proxy of the UIExtension window.

Obtains the area where this window cannot be displayed, for example, the system bar area, notch, gesture area, and soft keyboard area.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { window.AvoidAreaType } type - Type of the avoid area.
@returns { window.AvoidArea } Area where the window cannot be displayed.
节点.return_description: Area where the window cannot be displayed.

节点.功能描述:
Subscribes to the event indicating changes to the area where the window cannot be displayed. indicating the event of changes to the area where the window cannot be displayed.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'avoidAreaChange' } type - Event type. The value is fixed at 'avoidAreaChange',
@param { Callback<AvoidAreaInfo> } callback - Callback used to return the avoid area information.

parameters.说明: Event type. The value is fixed at 'avoidAreaChange',
Callback used to return the avoid area information.

节点.功能描述:
Unsubscribes from the event indicating changes to the area where the window cannot be displayed. indicating the event of changes to the area where the window cannot be displayed.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'avoidAreaChange' } type - Event type. The value is fixed at 'avoidAreaChange',
@param { Callback<AvoidAreaInfo> } callback - Callback used to return the avoid area information.

parameters.说明: Event type. The value is fixed at 'avoidAreaChange',
Callback used to return the avoid area information.

节点.功能描述:
Subscribes to the window size change event of the host application.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'windowSizeChange' } type - Event type. The value is fixed at 'windowSizeChange', indicating the window size change event.
@param { Callback<window.Size> } callback - Callback used to return the window size.

parameters.说明: Event type. The value is fixed at 'windowSizeChange', indicating the window size change event.
Callback used to return the window size.

节点.功能描述:

1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.

注释信息: @param { 'windowSizeChange' } type - Event type. The value is fixed at 'windowSizeChange', indicating the window size change event.
@param { Callback<window.Size> } callback - Callback used to return the window size.

parameters.说明: Event type. The value is fixed at 'windowSizeChange', indicating the window size change event.
Callback used to return the window size.

节点.功能描述:
Subscribes to changes in the position and size of the component (EmbeddedComponent or UIExtensionComponent). This API can be used only on 2-in-1 devices. indicating the rectangle change event for the component (EmbeddedComponent or UIExtensionComponent).
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'rectChange' } type - Event type. The value is fixed at 'rectChange',
@param { 'number' } reasons - The reasons of component rect change.
@param { Callback<RectChangeOptions> } callback - Callback used to return the RectChangeOptions.
@throws { BusinessError } 801 - Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

parameters.说明: Event type. The value is fixed at 'rectChange',
The reasons of component rect change.
Callback used to return the RectChangeOptions.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

节点.功能描述:
Unsubscribes from changes in the position and size of the component (EmbeddedComponent or UIExtensionComponent). This API can be used only on 2-in-1 devices. indicating the rectangle change event for the component (EmbeddedComponent or UIExtensionComponent).
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { 'rectChange' } type - Event type. The value is fixed at 'rectChange',
@param { Callback<RectChangeOptions> } callback - Callback used to return the RectChangeOptions.
@throws { BusinessError } 801 - Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

parameters.说明: Event type. The value is fixed at 'rectChange',
Callback used to return the RectChangeOptions.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

节点.功能描述:
Sets whether to hide insecure windows. When called by modal UIExtension and shouldHide == false, the "ohos.permission.ALLOW_SHOW_NON_SECURE_WINDOWS" permission is required.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
1. Permission denied. Interface caller does not have permission "ohos.permission.ALLOW_SHOW_NON_SECURE_WINDOWS".
2. The UIExtension window proxy is abnormal.
注释信息: @param { boolean } shouldHide - Whether to hide insecure windows. The value true means to hide insecure windows, and false means the opposite.
@returns { Promise<void> } - The promise returned by the function.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300003 - This window manager service works abnormally.

parameters.说明: Whether to hide insecure windows. The value true means to hide insecure windows, and false means the opposite.

节点.return_description: - The promise returned by the function.

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
This window manager service works abnormally.

节点.功能描述:
Creates a subwindow for this window proxy. This API uses a promise to return the result.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Name of the subwindow.
@param { window.SubWindowOptions } subWindowOptions - Parameters used for creating the subwindow.
@returns { Promise<window.Window> } Promise used to return the subwindow.
@throws { BusinessError } 801 - Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300002 - This window state is abnormal.

parameters.说明: Parameters used for creating the subwindow.

节点.return_description: Promise used to return the subwindow.

error_codes.description: Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

节点.功能描述: Adds or deletes the watermark flag for this window. This API uses a promise to return the result. and false means to delete the watermark flag.
注释信息: @param { boolean } enable - Whether to add or delete the flag. The value true means to add the watermark flag,
@returns { Promise<void> } - The promise returned by the function
@throws { BusinessError } 1300002 - The UIExtension window proxy is abnormal.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300003 - This window manager service works abnormally.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300008 - The display device is abnormal.

parameters.说明: Whether to add or delete the flag. The value true means to add the watermark flag,

节点.return_description: - The promise returned by the function

error_codes.description: The UIExtension window proxy is abnormal.
This window manager service works abnormally.

节点.功能描述:
Sets the events that the component (EmbeddedComponent or UIExtensionComponent) will occupy, preventing the host from responding to these events within the component's area.
1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
2. Incorrect parameters types.
3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { EventFlag } eventFlags - Type of events to occupy. For details about the available values, see {@link uiExtension.EventFlag }.
@returns { Promise<void> } - The promise returned by the function
@throws { BusinessError } 1300002 - This window state is abnormal.
@throws { BusinessError } 1300003 - This window manager service works abnormally.

parameters.说明: Type of events to occupy. For details about the available values, see {@link uiExtension.EventFlag }.

节点.return_description: - The promise returned by the function

error_codes.description: This window manager service works abnormally.
